name: Mutual Exclusion
generated_spec:
---- MODULE MutualExclusion ----

EXTENDS Naturals, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N   (* number of processes *), ALLPROCS

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
\* Variables -----------------------------------------------------------

VARIABLES procState      (* mapping from each process to its current state *), p, procState

vars == <<procState>>

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
\* State definitions -----------------------------------------------

Idle     == "idle"
Trying   == "trying"
Critical == "critical"

StatesSet == { Idle , Trying , Critical }

AllProcs == DOMAIN [i \in 1 .. N |-> i]

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
\* Initial condition ----------------------------------------------

Init ==
    /\ procState = [p \in AllProcs |
                    IF p <= N THEN Idle ELSE FALSE]          \* all start idle

TypeOK ==
    /\ procState : ALLPROCS -> StatesSet                \* domain and range constraints

(* ------------------------------------------------------------------ *)
\* Transition relation ---------------------------------------------

Try(p) ==
    /\ procState[p] = Idle
    /\ UNCHANGED (procState EXCEPT ![q \mapsto 
        CASE q=p => Trying,
             TRUE => procState[q]])

EnterCrit(p) ==
    /\ procState[p] = Trying
    /\ (\A r \in AllProcs: r # p ==> procState[r] /= Critical)
    /\ UNCHAINSED(procState, [r \mid r#p][!=>?])           \* placeholder for unchanged except p

ExitCrit(p) ==
    /\ procState[p] = Critical
    /\ UNCHANGED (procState EXCEPT ![p' \mapsto Idle])

Next ==
    \/  \E  p \in AllProcs:


    \/  \A  p \in AllProcs:


    \/  \A  p \in AllProcs:
         EXITCRIT  :
            ExitCrit(p)

Terminating == UNCHANGED vars   (* allow termination *)

Spec == Init /\
       [][][ Next ]_vars \
       /\ Terminating

====
